div.head: The Minister in Switzerland (Harrison) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
7406. American Interests—Liberated Italy. Legation’s 5150, August 9, 9 p.m. Foreign Office note November 2 states American representatives, according telegram from Swiss Legation Rome, in
southern Italy have taken over completely from October 31, all matters concerning American interests in Rome area. From that date Swiss Legation discontinued payment relief.

Protection American interests in Florence consular district not yet turned over to American representatives. Accordingly Swiss Consulate that city will continue these functions.Telegram 8210, December 18, from Bern, indicated that according to Swiss Foreign Office note of December 16, “Swiss Consulate Florence continues protection of American interests in provinces Florence, Arezzo, Livorno, Pisa, Ravenna, Apuania, Forli, Lucas [Lucca?], Pistoia, and Siena” (125.7711/12–1844).
